title: selaginella moratii
intro: Selaginella moratii, also known as Morat's spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella moratii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella moratii can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
